steps.title: Identify what 'enable' requires
steps.content: The sentence has 'enables cartographers [blank] maps' as its key structure. The verb 'enable,' when followed by an object like 'cartographers,' requires a particular verb form.

steps.title: Choose the correct pattern
steps.content: In Standard English, 'enable + object' must be followed by 'to + base verb.' Choice B, 'to create,' provides this form: 'enables cartographers to create maps.' The other options don't follow the required 'to + base verb' pattern. That matches choice B — B is correct.
